nodes.name: When Executed by Another Workflow
nodes.notes: Input contract for caller workflows. Required: query. Optional: count, country, search_lang, ui_lang, freshness, safesearch.

nodes.name: Brave Web Search
nodes.notes: Create an HTTP Header Auth credential named 'Brave Search API'. Header Name: X-Subscription-Token. Header Value: your Brave Search API key.

parameters.content:
## Brave API credential
Create an **HTTP Header Auth** credential named `Brave Search API`.

Header Name: `X-Subscription-Token`
Header Value: your Brave Search API key.

The HTTP node also sends `Accept: application/json`, `Accept-Encoding: gzip`, and `Cache-Control: no-cache`.

json.query: n8n execute sub-workflow trigger input data
